rule: Do not automate based on price alone. Automate only when inputs are machine-verifiable, fulfilment deterministic, entitlement idempotent, exceptions fail safely, refund/recovery exists, founder judgement is not required, evidence and delivery are durable, and customer access is E2E tested.

blockingReasons: paid report E2E fulfilment not proved
evidence/delivery records not proved durable end to end
customer access after fulfilment not proved
outcome verification and cadence require human oversight
content entitlement may be automatable, but decision-authority fulfilment path is separate
subscription/access lifecycle must be E2E proved
